prompt: Maintaining the twins from the reference image, changing their clothing to casual stylish clothes, in a realistic live-action style, set in a massive TV quiz show studio audience. It captures a tense moment with high stakes prize money. The twins sit side-by-side in the front row VIP seats, hands clasped in prayer. Both have serious, anxious expressions, waiting breathlessly for the answer. The entire studio features grand, flashy lighting with light from large LED screens illuminating the audience. The surrounding crowd is silent, creating a breathtaking atmosphere. The host and contestants are out of frame; the camera focus is solely on the audience. Spotlights highlight the twins, emphasizing realistic skin textures, natural expressions, and a cinematic composition. Telephoto lens style, shallow depth of field, documentary-style TV footage, photorealistic, ultra-high definition, realistic movie quality. No corporate logos or text on clothing, signs, or TV screens.
